title: Verifier Output
description: Structured artifact produced by the Verifier sub-agent after re-fetching every anchored span and exact-matching against the source. R5 HashEcho is the originating rule; R10 CurrencyTag piggybacks on the same fetch to compute staleness.

asserted_text.description: Text the Drafter asserted (the quote content).

live_text.description: Text returned by kb_span_get_by_hash. Empty when status=hash_not_found.

status.description: pass: clean. hash_not_found: anchor.hash not in retrieval_log. text_mismatch: anchor resolves but asserted_text is not a substring of live_text. corpus_drift: hash resolves but live re-hash of the (doc_id, chars) differs (corpus was re-ingested mid-session).

live_hash.description: When status=corpus_drift, the live hash of (doc_id, char_start, char_end) at verification time.

current_through.description: Source's current_through metadata at verification time (R10 input). Stale relative to TaskSpec.requires_fresh determines whether R10 fires.

staleness_status.description: R10 verdict for this anchor. stale_annotated: over threshold but TaskSpec.requires_fresh=false (warning). stale_blocking: over threshold AND requires_fresh=true (blocks; triggers refresh).

summary.description: Counts for fast orchestrator dispatch decisions: any non-zero in hash_not_found / text_mismatch / stale_blocking triggers a revise loop or R10 refresh.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time the Verifier spent. Tracked to surface performance regressions (target: <5s per deliverable typical case).
